package.name: ros2_pid_tuner_gui
package.description: PyQt5 GUI for tuning ros2_control PID gains on any controller that exposes runtime gains. Auto-detects the controller type (pid_controller or joint_trajectory_controller), supports manual edit, step-response measurement, and auto-tuning (Ziegler-Nichols, Cohen-Coon, CHR, IMC, Relay Feedback, Bayesian Optimization).
